01
Strength · Conditioning · Suva, Fiji

Get stronger, together.

A real strength and conditioning gym in the heart of Suva. Heavy barbells, hard conditioning, and group classes that push you — built for people who show up and put in the work.

Join Us Now See the Programs
Strength /Conditioning /Olympic Lifting /Group Classes /Open 5AM – 9PM / Strength /Conditioning /Olympic Lifting /Group Classes /Open 5AM – 9PM /
The Floor
// Who we are

Built in Suva. Earned in reps.

Ironside started with a simple idea: a serious gym for people who want to get genuinely strong, without the mirror-selfie circus. Barbells, racks, sleds, and coaches who actually know how to program a lift.

Whether you're chasing your first pull-up or a 200kg deadlift, you train alongside people doing the same. We coach the basics until they're heavy, then we keep going. Show up, do the work, get better.

What we train →
// Train with us

The Programs

01

Strength

Barbell-focused programming — squat, press, deadlift. Structured progression, real coaching, real numbers on the bar.

4–5 sessions / week
02

Conditioning

Engine-building intervals, sleds, rowers and bikes. Brutal, scalable, and over before you can talk yourself out of it.

45 min / session
03

Group Classes

Coached classes that mix strength and conditioning in one hour. Show up, follow the board, leave wrecked in the best way.

Daily · all levels
04

Olympic Lifting

Snatch and clean & jerk technique from the ground up. Small groups, heavy focus on positions before load.

2 sessions / week
05

Beginner Track

New to lifting? Start here. Six weeks of fundamentals, coached one-on-one, before you join the main floor.

6-week intro
06

Open Gym

Got your own program? Use the full floor — racks, platforms, dumbbells to 50kg, and a coach on hand if you want eyes on a lift.

Members · anytime
5AM
Doors open daily
28
Classes a week
6
Coaches on staff
1st
Session is free
// From the floor

What members say

"

Came in barely able to do a press-up. A year later I deadlift more than my own bodyweight. The coaching here is the real deal.

Sevanaia T. — Member, 14 months
"

The group classes ruined every other gym for me. You actually get coached, not just counted in. Best community in Suva, hands down.

Litia W. — Member, 2 years

Your first session is on us.

Come train, meet the coaches, and see the floor. No contract to walk in the door — just turn up ready to work.
